name: 850Above Credit Repair Los Angeles
description_short: 850Above offers professional credit repair services across the USA, disputing inaccurate items on credit reports while providing credit building strategies and monitoring tools.
description_long:
850Above Credit Repair Los Angeles is a credit repair service operating nationally across the United States. The company positions itself as a full-service credit solution provider, going beyond simple dispute filing to offer comprehensive credit rehabilitation. Their business model centers on helping consumers recover from negative credit events and reporting errors that impede financial progress.

The company's core offerings include three primary services: credit repair (disputing inaccurate, outdated, or unverifiable items with all three major credit bureaus), credit building (strategies for lowering utilization, establishing positive payment history, and responsible account opening), and credit monitoring (ongoing score tracking and protection). They also provide free tools including a DIY Credit Repair Kit and Free Credit Audit consultations with credit experts to help clients understand their specific credit challenges.

What distinguishes 850Above is their emphasis on transparency and measurable outcomes. They publicly claim an average 100-point score increase within the first 6 months of service and emphasize clear, step-by-step guidance rather than opaque processes. The company positions credit repair as part of a longer-term journey that includes both error correction and positive habit formation. They offer free consultations and a downloadable DIY kit, suggesting a tiered approach where clients can self-serve or upgrade to professional assistance.

The company's main limitation is that credit repair outcomes vary significantly by individual circumstances—their own FAQ acknowledges timelines of 3–6 months depend on complexity of credit history. While they claim expertise in inquiry removal and bureau disputes, the website provides limited detail about success rates, specific dispute methodologies, or regulatory compliance disclosures. As with all credit repair companies, consumers should understand that legitimate negative items cannot be removed, only inaccurate ones.
address: 800 W 1st St ste 406, Los Angeles, CA 90012

pros: Offers free credit audit and consultation with credit experts before requiring payment
Provides free downloadable DIY Credit Repair Kit for self-directed consumers
Claims average 100-point score increase in first 6 months of service
Operates nationally across the USA, not limited to Los Angeles despite company name
Combines three complementary services: repair, building, and monitoring in one platform
Transparent about key credit factors (payment history, utilization, account age impact)
Addresses both error correction and long-term credit rebuilding strategies
cons: Website lacks specific information about pricing, service packages, or terms—requires contacting company
No details provided on dispute success rates, average timelines, or what percentage of items are successfully removed
Limited explanation of regulatory compliance, licensing status, or adherence to FCRA/FDCPA requirements
Company name suggests Los Angeles focus but operates nationally; branding may mislead local search users
FAQ acknowledges results vary widely (3-6 months) but doesn't clearly explain what factors determine individual outcomes
best_for: Consumers with mixed credit issues (both errors and negative marks) seeking both repair and rebuilding guidance
People wanting professional dispute filing combined with credit building coaching and monitoring
Those preferring a single vendor for credit repair, building, and ongoing score tracking
diagnosis: 850Above is best for consumers with errors on their credit reports who want professional dispute filing paired with rebuilding strategies and ongoing monitoring. Primary caveat: credit repair timelines are highly variable (3-6 months per their FAQ), success depends on dispute validity, and the website lacks pricing transparency and specific compliance disclosures needed to fully evaluate the company.
services: Credit repair with disputes to all three major bureaus
Inaccurate item removal and dispute filing
Hard inquiry dispute and removal service
Free credit audit and professional review
DIY credit repair kit and educational resources
Free consultation calls with credit experts
